name: tplmap
description: Server-Side Template Injection (SSTI) detection and exploitation tool. Supports multiple template engines including Jinja2, Twig, Freemarker, and more.

metadata.ai_description: tplmap is an automated Server-Side Template Injection detection and exploitation tool. Use it when you suspect SSTI vulnerabilities in web applications. It fingerprintes the template engine in use, then exploits the vulnerability to achieve code execution, file read/write, or OS shell access. Supports Jinja2, Twig, Smarty, Freemarker, Velocity, Jade, Mako, and more.
use_cases: Detecting SSTI vulnerabilities in web parameters and headers
Identifying which template engine is in use via fingerprinting
Achieving remote code execution through SSTI exploitation
Reading sensitive files via template injection
Obtaining an interactive OS shell on the target
limitations: Some exploit techniques depend on the templating engine version
May not support all template engines
Requires a vulnerable parameter to inject into

parsing.extraction_hint: Extract detected template engine, injection technique used, successful exploits, OS shell access, and any code execution results
